title: A previous audit-to-repair cycle did not clear one or more workflow-layer findings before work resumed
description: Remediate CYCLE001 by correcting the validated issue and rerunning the relevant quality checks.
suggested_fix_approach: Before another repair run, compare the latest diagnosis pack against repair_history, identify which findings persisted, and treat repeated deprecated package-managed drift as a repair failure to fix rather than as preserved intent.
repair_class: Scafforge package work required before the next subject-repo run
summary: Before another repair run, compare the latest diagnosis pack against repair_history, identify which findings persisted, and treat repeated deprecated package-managed drift as a repair failure to fix rather than as preserved intent.

title: Godot headless validation fails
description: Remediate EXEC-GODOT-004 by correcting the validated issue and rerunning the relevant quality checks.
suggested_fix_approach: Run a deterministic `godot --headless --path . --quit` validation during audit and keep the repo blocked until it succeeds or returns an explicit environment blocker instead.
summary: Run a deterministic `godot --headless --path . --quit` validation during audit and keep the repo blocked until it succeeds or returns an explicit environment blocker instead.

title: Source imports reference missing local modules
description: Remediate REF-003 by correcting the validated issue and rerunning the relevant quality checks.
suggested_fix_approach: Audit local relative import paths and fail when the referenced module file is missing.
summary: Audit local relative import paths and fail when the referenced module file is missing.

title: The generated lease-ownership contract is split across coordinator and worker surfaces, so agents can disagree about who should claim a ticket and when bootstrap gates apply
description: Remediate WFLOW012 by correcting the validated issue and rerunning the relevant quality checks.
suggested_fix_approach: Adopt one lease model everywhere: the team leader owns `ticket_claim` and `ticket_release`, specialists work only inside the already-active ticket lease, and only Wave 0 setup work may claim before bootstrap is ready.
summary: Adopt one lease model everywhere: the team leader owns `ticket_claim` and `ticket_release`, specialists work only inside the already-active ticket lease, and only Wave 0 setup work may claim before bootstrap is ready.

title: Fail-state routing is still under-specified in generated prompts or workflow skills
description: Remediate WFLOW024 by correcting the validated issue and rerunning the relevant quality checks.
suggested_fix_approach: Document review, QA, smoke-test, and bootstrap failure recovery paths in ticket-execution, and instruct the team leader to follow transition_guidance.recovery_action whenever it is present.
summary: Document review, QA, smoke-test, and bootstrap failure recovery paths in ticket-execution, and instruct the team leader to follow transition_guidance.recovery_action whenever it is present.

title: Read-only shell agents still allow commands that can mutate repo-tracked files
description: Remediate read-only-shell-mutation-loophole by correcting the validated issue and rerunning the relevant quality checks.
suggested_fix_approach: Keep read-only shell allowlists to inspection commands only and move mutation into write-capable roles.
summary: Keep read-only shell allowlists to inspection commands only and move mutation into write-capable roles.

title: One or more repo-local skills still contain generic placeholder text instead of project-specific guidance
description: Remediate SKILL001 by correcting the validated issue and rerunning the relevant quality checks.
suggested_fix_approach: Populate every baseline local skill with concrete repo-specific rules and validation commands; generated `.opencode/skills/` files must not retain template filler.
summary: Populate every baseline local skill with concrete repo-specific rules and validation commands; generated `.opencode/skills/` files must not retain template filler.

title: The team leader prompt leaves workflow mechanics underspecified enough that weaker models can thrash or search for bypasses
description: Remediate WFLOW006 by correcting the validated issue and rerunning the relevant quality checks.
suggested_fix_approach: Tell the team leader to route from `ticket_lookup.transition_guidance`, stop after repeated lifecycle errors, leave stage artifacts to the owning specialist, and keep slash commands human-only.
summary: Tell the team leader to route from `ticket_lookup.transition_guidance`, stop after repeated lifecycle errors, leave stage artifacts to the owning specialist, and keep slash commands human-only.
